sections.subtitle: Recent Form
sections.text: Elche have had mixed results in their last 5 matches, securing 1 win, 1 draw, and 3 losses, with a strong showing in a 4-0 cup win but struggles in league play. Real Sociedad, on the other hand, are in better form with 3 wins, 1 draw, and no losses in their last 5 matches, including a thrilling 3-2 victory over Athletic Club. This momentum gives Sociedad an edge heading into the match.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In their last two head-to-head encounters, Real Sociedad have dominated Elche, winning both matches (2-0 and 1-0) while keeping clean sheets. Historically, Sociedad have won 6 straight matches against Elche, often scoring first, which could weigh on Elche's confidence at home.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Elche, sitting 9th with 14 points, boast strong possession (58.9%, 3rd in league) and ground duels won (53.1%, 2nd), but their attacking output (12 goals) and big chance conversion (39.1%) remain average. Real Sociedad, 14th with 12 points, have scored 13 goals and shown late-game resilience, often scoring between 46-60 minutes, but their defense has conceded 16 goals. Elche’s home advantage and possession play might challenge Sociedad's inconsistent backline.

sections.subtitle: Key Players to Watch
sections.text: For Elche, André Silva and Rafa Mir, both with 4 goals each, will be crucial in breaking Sociedad’s defense, while Federico Redondo’s recent form (8.1 avg rating) adds midfield dynamism. Real Sociedad’s Mikel Oyarzabal (4 goals, 2 assists) and Brais Méndez (2 goals, 2 assists) are key threats, especially with their ability to create big chances (Oyarzabal ranks 2nd in the league).

sections.subtitle: Match Outlook
sections.text: Despite Sofascore’s prediction favoring Elche with a 46% chance of winning, Real Sociedad’s recent form and head-to-head dominance suggest a tight contest. Elche’s home strength and possession game could lead to a competitive match, but Sociedad’s attacking momentum might exploit defensive gaps. A draw or narrow win for either side seems likely.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Half-time overview
halftimeSections.text: At half-time, the match between Elche and Real Sociedad remains goalless with a scoreline of 0-0. Elche have dominated possession and shown more intent in the attacking third, while Real Sociedad have struggled to create consistent threats. Both teams have had their moments, but neither has managed to capitalize on their opportunities. The game is finely poised, with Elche holding a slight edge due to their control of the ball and territorial advantage.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Elche's performance
halftimeSections.text: Elche have been the more dominant side in the first half, controlling the majority of possession and making frequent entries into the final third. Their attacking play has been promising, with a notable number of penalty area entries and a couple of shots on target. They've also hit the woodwork once, indicating they’ve come close to breaking the deadlock. Defensively, they’ve been solid, winning a fair share of duels and maintaining pressure on Real Sociedad. Players like Rafa Mir and Adria Pedrosa have been key in creating opportunities.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Real Sociedad's performance
halftimeSections.text: Real Sociedad have found it challenging to impose themselves in the first half, with significantly less possession compared to Elche. Their final third entries and penalty area penetrations have been limited, though they’ve managed a couple of shots on target. Defensively, they’ve held firm, winning a higher percentage of aerial duels, but they’ve struggled to transition effectively into attack. Players like Mikel Oyarzabal and Takefusa Kubo have shown flashes of danger but need more support to create clear chances.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Attack momentum analysis
halftimeSections.text: The first half saw Elche take control of the attacking momentum for extended periods, particularly in the middle and latter stages, with sustained spells of pressure in the opposition half. Real Sociedad started with some early intent but were quickly overshadowed by Elche’s persistent forward pushes. However, towards the end of the half, Real Sociedad managed a brief resurgence with a notable attacking spell, hinting at potential danger if they can build on it. Overall, Elche have been the more proactive side in creating attacking opportunities.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Key areas to watch in the second half
halftimeSections.text: The second half will likely hinge on whether Elche can convert their dominance into goals, as they’ve shown more intent and territorial control. Real Sociedad will need to improve their transition play and capitalize on counter-attacking opportunities to turn the tide. Fatigue could play a factor, especially for Elche, who have expended significant energy in maintaining possession. Substitutions and tactical adjustments will be crucial for both sides to break the stalemate.
